reviews.review_title: This game is sucks because of the mods
reviews.review_description: I swear to God each time I join a server they seem friendly and I'm really happy about it. But then they kick me after a while and they try and force me to buy the mods. Otherwise they'll kick me more so since that kept happening. I'm forcing myself to write this review because it's awful what they're doing. Remove the mods and maybe you'll actually get popular again. Sorry I had to write this.
